Jacob Fikirini must be held accountable for MURDERING Cecile Otieno This bibi ya Joho, organizes empowerment meeting Kariokor. He contacts ODM grass root leaders wa ghetto led by Cecile. After spewing word salad, shoga gives 60 youth 10k wagawe As in sh160 each to shout tutam. When did we become this desperate and pathetic! Youth wakaleta noma, Waka over power police, wakavunja gari ya Fikichietha, Then this son of a rotten cunt tells Cecile, “si wewe ndio organizer, ingia kwa gari uchukulie boys kitu bas” Kwa gari waka argue, “huwezi nifanya nipange youth whole day for 160! Kwani who are you?” “Ati who am I?” The thing went skkkkrrrr ya, papapa, skrrryaa, pupupu kudum! Minutes later!
